steps.name: TrainingMode
steps.description: Adaptive question practice with 3 modes (daily, topic, weakness). Uses Jetpack Compose for UI, Hilt for DI, and Room for local persistence. Questions loaded from JSON asset.

steps.name: ExamSimulation
steps.description: Timed 30-question mock exam with gap analysis. Uses CountDownTimer, StateFlow for exam state, and Compose animations for transitions.

steps.name: SkillMap
steps.description: Competency tracking per category with visual grid. Uses LazyVerticalGrid, custom Compose canvas for competence indicators, and Flow-based data binding.

steps.name: ReadinessScore
steps.description: 0-100% exam readiness milestone display. Uses animated CircularProgressIndicator, persistence via DataStore, and reactive updates from training data.

step_results.name: TrainingMode
step_results.command: C:\Python314\python.exe main.py --template feature --name TrainingMode --profile standard --approval auto --project askfin_android

step_results.name: ExamSimulation
step_results.command: C:\Python314\python.exe main.py --template feature --name ExamSimulation --profile standard --approval auto --project askfin_android

step_results.name: SkillMap
step_results.command: C:\Python314\python.exe main.py --template screen --name SkillMap --profile standard --approval auto --project askfin_android

step_results.name: ReadinessScore
step_results.command: C:\Python314\python.exe main.py --template screen --name ReadinessScore --profile standard --approval auto --project askfin_android
